scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event,mobile -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "yarn workspace api-gateway dev" "yarn workspace ms-user dev" "yarn workspace ms-post dev" "yarn workspace ms-event dev" "yarn workspace @monorepo/mobile dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "yarn workspace api-gateway dev" "yarn workspace ms-user dev" "yarn workspace ms-post dev" "yarn workspace ms-event dev"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n user,post,event -c green,cyan,yellow "yarn workspace ms-user dev" "yarn workspace ms-post dev" "yarn workspace ms-event dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "yarn workspace api-gateway build" "yarn workspace ms-user build" "yarn workspace ms-post build" "yarn workspace ms-event build"
scripts.lint: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "yarn workspace api-gateway lint" "yarn workspace ms-user lint" "yarn workspace ms-post lint" "yarn workspace ms-event lint"
scripts.test: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "yarn workspace api-gateway test" "yarn workspace ms-user test" "yarn workspace ms-post test" "yarn workspace ms-event test"
